overall.description: A high-fidelity bus simulator game showing a first-person driver's perspective during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates wet urban streets, stops to pick up passengers at a bus shelter, and waits at traffic lights, with continuous windshield wiper motion and realistic water effects on the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with tram tracks and traffic signals

events.description: windshield wipers sweep across the rain-covered windshield
bus begins moving forward from stationary position as traffic light changes

agents.ego_description: stationary at red traffic light at urban intersection, then accelerates forward

entered.detail: large intersection with traffic signals and tram tracks crossing through
tall yellow construction crane visible above distant buildings
contemporary glass facade office building with reflective windows
metal tram rails embedded in the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The bus waits at a red light at a wide urban intersection during heavy rain. Windshield wipers rhythmically clear the glass as construction cranes and modern glass buildings frame the background. The bus begins to move as the light changes, crossing the tram tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban arterial road with bus stops

agents.ego_description: driving along wet road at moderate speed, approaching next bus stop

entered.detail: row of deciduous trees lining the left side of the wet street
glass and metal bus shelter with bench and timetable display

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a tree-lined urban street with wet asphalt reflecting the grey sky. Residential apartment buildings line the right side while the bus approaches a glass shelter marking the next stop. No pedestrians are visible on this stretch of road.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with passenger shelter and boarding area

events.description: bus pulls over to the curb and comes to a complete stop at bus stop
bus doors open to allow waiting passengers to board
bus doors close and vehicle begins to pull away from the stop

agents.ego_description: pulls up to bus stop, opens doors for passenger boarding, then closes doors and departs

notable_agents.action: woman in red coat boarding the bus through the front door

entered.detail: group of people standing under the shelter waiting to board
bicycle locked to a rack near the bus stop shelter

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a shelter where passengers wait in the rain. The doors open and a woman in a red coat boards while others queue. After a brief stop, the doors close and the bus pulls away from the curb, leaving the bicycle rack and shelter behind.

events.description: bus follows traffic flow behind truck and passenger cars ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through moderate traffic, maintaining distance from vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: modern commercial structures with large windows and signage
metal security fence running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a commercial street with modern buildings on the left and a security fence on the right. Traffic is moderate with a black sedan directly ahead. The windshield wipers continue to clear the heavy rain as the bus approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection stopped at red traffic light

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop behind black sedan at red traffic light
large white truck passes by on the left side in adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light, waiting behind queue of vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at red light directly ahead with brake lights on
blue car stopped in adjacent lane to the left

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole showing red light for stopped vehicles
large contemporary office complex with glass curtain walls
large white commercial truck with trailer passing on the left

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a red light behind a black sedan, with a blue car in the adjacent lane. A large white truck passes by on the left. The bus waits at the intersection with modern office buildings visible to the right, windshield wipers continuing to clear the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver navigating a rain-slicked city, moving from a wide industrial intersection through residential areas and into a commercial district. It begins at a red light amidst construction cranes and glass skyscrapers, with windshield wipers rhythmically clearing the glass as the bus crosses tram tracks. As the vehicle proceeds, the scene shifts to a tree-lined residential street with wet asphalt reflecting a grey sky, eventually slowing to a stop at a glass shelter where a woman in a red coat boards. The bus then pulls away from the curb and enters a commercial zone characterized by security fences and moderate traffic, following a black sedan through the heavy downpour. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at another red light, framed by modern office buildings and passing vehicles as the wipers continue their steady motion.
